steps: Inject mice intravenously with CD45-FITC 3ug/mice ( 6 µL from vial/mice) for 00:03:00 - 00:05:00 , then euthanized directly by decapitating head to stop blood circulation.
Collect the brain for each experimental condition vs control.
Dissociate brain in RPMIc plus collagenase-D 1 mg/ml , DNase 150 ug/ml as follow:
CD45 is prepared as 180 µL CD45-FITC + 4320 µL PBS → to inject 150 ul/mice.
Keep one mouse non injected for Live/Dead staining.
Place the brain in 15mm petri dish and add 2ml/brain of the collagenase-DNase mix.
Cut the brain into 8 longitudinal pieces and collect in one tube using 1ml tip (cut the tip to allow pieces to go through).
Transfer to tube (gentleMACS TM C tubes, cat 130096334) and make sure to lock it.
Keep the brain pieces on the downside of the spiral bend.

Fix the tube to the machine and select the brain dissociation (preset the machine as shown below in the brain dissociation machine setup section)→OK, will turn light and start homogenization. Tissue dissociation machine setup: Temp. ON Spin 200 rpm 1’’ Spin 300 rpm 1’’ Spin 400 rpm 3’’ Spin -400 rpm 3’’ Spin 400 rpm 3’’ Spin -400 rpm 1’’ Spin 200 rpm 4’’ Spin -400 rpm 2’’ Spin 400 rpm 3’’ Spin 200 rpm 6’’ Spin -200 rpm 2’’ Spin 200 rpm 8’’ Spin 0 rpm 45’ 0’’ Temp OFF
When dissociation finish ( 00:45:00 ), homogenize with the end of the 5ml syringe over 70 um strainer on a 50 ml falcon tube. Wash the strainer with PBS to ensure the collection of all cells.
Centrifuge 2000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes .
During that time prepare 37% and 70% percoll from 90% percoll in 10X PBS.
For 100 mL of 90% Percoll: 90 mL percoll and 10 mL PBS 10X.
For 45 mL of 70% Percoll: 35.7 mL from 90% Percoll + 10.3 mL PBS 1X.
For 43.75 mL of 37% Percoll: 18 mL from 90% Percoll + 25.75 mL PBS 1X.
Add 3 mL of 70% Percoll in a 15 ml tubes. Resuspend the brain pellet in 3 mL of 37% Percoll and overlay gently on top of 70% Percoll (drop on the wall to prevent disruption).
Centrifuge at 2000 rpm, , 5 minutes .
Complete the volume to 10 mL with 1X PBS, gently invert the tube up and down at least one time.
Transfer the intermediate layer containing the cells to a new labelled 15ml tube.
After centrifugation, with the help of vacuum suction clear the upper lipid layer on the top of the tubes.
Centrifuge 2000 rpm, , 20 minutes , brake-off.

Stain 1x10 6 cells from the brain or 3x10 6 cells from the spleen with the live/dead stain and after with extracellular staining panel. Do not forget to add a compensation for FITC in the compensation beads.
Collect the spleen from CD45-FITC injected mice in 3 mL of sterile complete RPMI (RPMIc).
Add 100 µL cold 1X PBS per well.
Wash in cold 1X PBS then repeat step 24.
Centrifuge at 1300 rpm, 12 °C, 3 minutes and remove supernatant.
Incubate the cells in presence of the re-stimulation mix for 05:00:00 at 37 °C and 5% CO 2 .
Add 100 µL of the following restimulation mix (at 2X concentration).
Add 100 µL of cells (3 x 10 6 cells) per well in 96-Well Round-Bottom plate (Fisher # 07200760).
Add volume to reach 30x10 6 cells/ml.
Count the cells on hemocytometer (1/100 dilution).
Reconstitute in 2.5 mL of sterile RPMIc.
Add 5 mL of sterile RPMIc and centrifuge at 1300 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes .
Perform red blood cell lysis: 5 mL of NH 4 Cl 0.83%, 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Centrifuge at 1300 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes .
Harvest the spleen in the culture hood with frosted microscope slide.
Don’t forget to add one well of PMA-IONO control ( 2 µL of stock PMA 5 μg/ml and Ionomycine 50 μg/ml ) in 200 µL final. The final concentration is 50 ng/ml of PMA and 500 ng/ml Ionomycin.
No-Stim (2X): RPMIc + 20 μg/ml Brefeldine A (BFA).
OVA Re-stimulation (2X): RPMIc + 20 μg/ml BFA final (stock solution at 1 mg/ml ) + 4 μg/ml OVA peptide.
SYRGL Restimulation (2X): RPMIc + 20 μg/ml BFA final (stock solution at 1 mg/ml ) + 4 μg/ml SYRGL peptide.

For example: for 4 mL of RPMIc, we add 1.6 µL of OVA peptide (stock at 10 mg/ml ) and 80 µL of BFA. for 4 mL of RPMIc, we add 1.6 µL of SYRGL peptide (stock at 10 mg/ml ) and 80 µL of BFA (stock at 1 mg/ml ).
Resuspend the cells in 200 µL of FACS WASH .
Wash in cold 1X PBS ( 300 µL ) and repeat step 24.
Add 100 µL of 1X PBS and repeat step 24.
Incubate 00:20:00 at Room temperature .
Add 100 µL of formaldehyde 4% per well (up and down).
Keep at 4 °C in parafilm and perform the intracellular staining within 5 days (it is better to do it the day after). Plate layout_2C (2 plates; Intracellular staining and Isotypic control): %s %s
creator: Lilia Rodriguez
